subcodes.first_line: The House built by the Friend, which throngs of worshippers circle round, and the House raised by the All-Glorious One, which He made His dwelling-place - the first none entered therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بیت بناه الخلیل و طافه العباد و بیت بناه الجلیل و جعله مثواه الاول ما دخل فیه و
